hooks.command: bash -c 'HANDOFF="c:/Users/nacus/OneDrive/Documents/Repositories/The-Reef/HANDOFF.md"; BACKUP="c:/Users/nacus/OneDrive/Documents/Repositories/The-Reef/.claude/handoff-backup.md"; FILE=""; [ -f "$HANDOFF" ] && FILE="$HANDOFF" || { [ -f "$BACKUP" ] && FILE="$BACKUP"; }; if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; content=open(sys.argv[1]).read(); print(json.dumps({\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PostCompact\", \"additionalContext\": \"--- HANDOFF (restored after compaction) ---\\n\" + content}}))" "$FILE"; fi'
